string.text: %s, the Zone is small. Sooner or later our paths will cross. And that will be your end.
Save up that loot, %s, save it up. You are just a porter. Soon I will take it all.
Hey %s! Your shoelace is untied... or is that a tripwire? Haha, watch your step.
I have a nose for fresh meat. %s, I feel you are nearby. Don't relax.
Boys, tell %s his debt is growing. Interest is ticking.
Looking through the scope... Looks like a man, but smells like %s. Waste of a bullet, let the mutants eat him.
Listen, %s, you stomp too loud. Everyone knows where you are. We know too.
%s, don't go into dark corners. Darkness is a friend to youth, but an enemy to trash like you.
They say %s is immortal? Let's check. I have some AP rounds lying around.
Oh, %s is on the network again. You should have stayed silent, you'd live longer.
Such a fat target, this %s. Too bad I'm far away. But the Zone is round.
Whoever sees %s — send him "regards" with 5.45 caliber. He will understand.
%s, you think you are the hunter? No, brother, you are the prey.
You are too cocky, %s. The Zone doesn't like that. We will fix it.
Saw your profile on the PDA, %s. Bad photo. The post-mortem one will be better.
Guys, heard the news? They say someone placed a huge bet on %s. Serious people are looking.
Weird stuff... Saw a group of mercs, asking about %s. What's that about?
%s, are you still alive? People at the bar said you were fed to Snorks.
Does anyone know if %s is sane? Walks around mumbling, staring at people. Shady guy.
Don't do business with %s. They say he scares away luck. Whoever goes with him doesn't come back.
Attention! A fake contract on %s is circulating in the network. Or maybe not fake... hard to tell with these encryptions.
Rumor has it %s found something valuable and is hiding now. You gotta share, stalker.
Betting a bottle of vodka that %s won't make it to the next Emission. Too much noise from him.
Hey %s, is your PDA glitching or are you spamming geotags on purpose? Turn it off, you're exposing yourself.
Folks, who is this %s anyway? The whole radio is buzzing about him.
They say the bounty on %s has increased. Wonder why? Pissed someone off?
%s, you should check your gear. Just in case it jams at the wrong moment. Heh.
Saw a stalker looking like %s, running from boars screaming like a girl. Or maybe I was mistaken?
Any info on %s? A client is interested. Pays in artifacts.
%s, they say you are a "double agent". Working for both sides. Watch out, you'll get burned.
